prompt_raw: abstract concept image for "chaos engineering": a small dark grid of terminal tiles with one tile fracturing into noise, single #FFCC00 accent on the fractured tile.
prompt_final:
Dark CRT terminal aesthetic on near-black `#0a0a0a`. Flat color only: surfaces
`#161616`, hairline strokes `#2a2a2a`, text `#e8e8e8`, single yellow accent
`#FFCC00` used sparingly. Monospace labels, terse. Diagrams and technical
compositions only — no characters, scenes, or illustrations. No gradients, no
shadows, no glow, no rounded corners, no neon or synthwave. Quiet terminal
aesthetic.

abstract concept image for "chaos engineering": a small dark grid of terminal tiles with one tile fracturing into noise, single #FFCC00 accent on the fractured tile.
